requirements.task_name: Request the cheapest slope stability quote option under $15,000 for a highway embankment
requirements.task_description: Submit a quote request for a highway embankment in Denver with a start date of 06/15/2025, selecting the cheapest service level including stability modeling and with max budget ≤ $15,000.

requirements.task_name: Select a foundation investigation package with CPT and consolidation testing under $12,000 and save it to a plan
requirements.task_description: Filter subsurface investigation packages for building foundations under $12,000, choose one that includes both CPT soundings and consolidation testing, and save it as 'Headquarters foundation study'.

requirements.task_name: Find a pile foundation case study for a commercial building over $5M and open its details
requirements.task_description: Filter to commercial building projects with pile foundations (and optionally ≥ $5M), then open the case study details for a project whose value is > $5M and read the full case study.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getProjects is called with filters.sector === 'commercial_buildings' AND filters.foundationType === 'pile_foundations' AND (filters.minProjectValueUsd == null OR filters.minProjectValueUsd >= 5000000) AND sortBy === 'project_value_high_to_low'. This records that the user has applied the correct filters and sort.
required_variables.value_to_set: { filters: filters || {}, sortBy: sortBy || null, recordedAt: this._nowIso() }
required_variables.reason: Track that the user filtered projects to commercial buildings with pile foundations, restricted to ≥ $5M, and sorted by project value high-to-low, as required by the task.

required_variables.set_condition: After a project is successfully found (project != null) for the given projectCaseStudyId parameter.
required_variables.reason: Track which specific project case study detail page was opened so the evaluator can verify that its sector is 'commercial_buildings', foundationType is 'pile_foundations', and projectValueUsd > 5,000,000.

requirements.task_name: Download the latest intermediate retaining wall design checklist published after 2022
requirements.task_description: Filter resources to intermediate-level retaining wall guides/checklists published on or after 01/01/2022, sort by newest first, then download the most recent retaining wall design checklist PDF.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getResources is called with filters.resourceType === 'guides_checklists' AND filters.topic === 'retaining_walls' AND filters.level === 'intermediate' AND filters.publishedDateStart != null AND filters.publishedDateStart >= '2022-01-01' AND sortBy === 'published_date_newest'.
required_variables.value_to_set: { filters: filters || {}, sortBy: sortBy || 'published_date_newest', recordedAt: this._nowIso() }
required_variables.reason: Track that the user applied the correct resource filters (type, topic, level, published date start ≥ 2022-01-01) and sorted by newest first as required by the task.

required_variables.set_condition: Right before returning a success response (success: true) when a resource with the given resourceId is found and has a pdfUrl.
required_variables.reason: Track which resource was actually downloaded so the evaluator can verify that it is the latest intermediate retaining wall design checklist published on or after 2022-01-01.

requirements.task_name: Book a 30-minute virtual consultation with a foundation design specialist on a specific date and time
requirements.task_description: Schedule a 30-minute virtual meeting with a foundation design specialist for a concept-stage project between 10:00 and 11:00 AM, with name and email provided, and confirm the booking.

requirements.task_name: Use the bearing capacity calculator and save the result to a named project
requirements.task_description: Calculate ultimate bearing capacity for a 2.0 m wide footing at 1.5 m depth in medium dense sand with FOS=3 and save the result under 'Office Tower A'.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to the newsletter with specific geotechnical topics and monthly frequency
requirements.task_description: Subscribe using client.geotech@example.com, selecting slope stability and deep foundations topics (without ground improvement), with a monthly email frequency and consulting engineer role.

requirements.task_name: Build a shortlist of three senior geotechnical experts for a West region slope stability project
requirements.task_description: Filter to West region geotechnical engineering staff with slope stability-related skills, then add three experts (≥10 years experience and slope stability/landslide skills) to the project team shortlist and view the shortlist.
